framework_info.framework_description: A comprehensive policy framework designed to establish governance, compliance, and operational standards for organizational activities. This framework provides structured guidance for policy development, implementation, and monitoring across various business functions.

policies.policy_description: Group-wide policy to discharge obligations under Chapter IV of the Prevention of Money-laundering Act, 2002.
policies.objective: To ensure compliance with the Prevention of Money-laundering Act, 2002

subpolicies.subpolicy_title: Use of New or Developing Technology
subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Identify and assess ML/TF risks associated with creation of new products and business practices including new delivery systems, and the usage of new/developing technologies for both new and existing products.
subpolicies.control: Risk assessments prior to launch or use of such products, practices, services, and technologies; take appropriate measures to manage and mitigate risks.

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: Risk Assessment for New Products and Business Practices
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Conduct a thorough risk assessment prior to launch or use of new products, business practices, delivery systems, and technologies to identify and assess ML/TF risks.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Risk Assessment for New Products and Business Practices' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.SubPolicyName: Use of New or Developing Technology

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: Use of New or Developing Technologies for Existing Products
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Assess ML/TF risks associated with the use of new or developing technologies for existing products and take appropriate measures to manage and mitigate risks.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Use of New or Developing Technologies for Existing Products' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.SubPolicyName: Use of New or Developing Technology

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Adopt appropriate innovations including artificial intelligence and machine learning (AI & ML) to support effective monitoring.
subpolicies.control: Leverage most recent technological advancements and tools for effective implementation of name screening to meet sanctions requirements.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Ensure that AI & ML models are trained on diverse and unbiased data sets to prevent discriminatory outcomes.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'AI & ML Training Data Management' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: AI & ML Model Transparency and Explainability
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Implement mechanisms to provide transparency and explainability of AI & ML model decisions, including auditing and reporting.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'AI & ML Model Transparency and Explainability' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: AI & ML Data Protection and Security
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Implement robust data protection and security measures to prevent unauthorized access, use, or disclosure of AI & ML-related data.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'AI & ML Data Protection and Security' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Leverage AI & ML tools to support effective name screening and meet sanctions requirements.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'AI & ML Sanctions Screening' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

policies.policy_description: Ensure that a group-wide policy is implemented to discharge obligations under the provisions of Chapter IV of the Prevention of Money-laundering Act, 2002.
policies.objective: To ensure compliance with the Prevention of Money-laundering Act, 2002

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Communicate the name, designation, address, and contact details of Designated Director and Principal Officer to the Reserve Bank.
subpolicies.control: Ensure that prior approval is obtained from senior management for establishing new correspondent banking relationships.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Ensure that the name, designation, address, and contact details of Designated Director and Principal Officer are communicated to the Reserve Bank.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Communication to RBI' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: Prior Approval for Correspondent Banking Relationships
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Ensure that prior approval is obtained from senior management before establishing new correspondent banking relationships.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Prior Approval for Correspondent Banking Relationships' may increase exposure to security incidents, audit findings, and operational inefficiencies.

policies.policy_description: Categorize customers based on risk factors such as geographical risk, type of products/services offered, delivery channel used, and types of transactions undertaken.
policies.objective: To identify, assess, and manage ML/TF risks

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Treat risk categorization and reasons for risk categorization of customers as confidential.
subpolicies.control: Broad principles may be laid down by REs for risk categorization of customers.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Treat risk categorization and reasons for risk categorization of customers as confidential.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Risk Categorization Confidentiality' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

policies.policy_description: Identify the beneficial owner and obtain additional information/document requirements for non-individual customers.
policies.objective: To identify, assess, and manage ML/TF risks

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Reduce the threshold for 'Controlling ownership interest' from 25% to 10% for companies and trusts.
subpolicies.control: Comply with provisions w.r.t revised threshold for 'Controlling ownership interest' to identify BO for legacy accounts.

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: Identification of Beneficial Owner (BO) - Legacy Accounts
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Comply with provisions w.r.t revised threshold for 'Controlling ownership interest' to identify BO for legacy accounts.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Identification of Beneficial Owner (BO) - Legacy Accounts' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Obtain additional information/document requirements for non-individual customers, including names of senior management personnel and registered office details.
subpolicies.control: Comply with provisions w.r.t CDD measures of non-individual customers for legacy accounts.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Obtain additional information/document requirements for non-individual customers, including names of senior management personnel and registered office details.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'CD Measure of Non-Individual Customers' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

policies.policy_description: Update customer information periodically using Aadhaar OTP-based e-KYC in non-face-to-face mode.
policies.objective: To ensure compliance with PML Rules, 2005

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Permit periodic updation of KYC using Aadhaar OTP-based e-KYC in non-face-to-face mode.
subpolicies.control: Implement de-duplication mechanism to ensure that the mobile number for Aadhaar authentication is same as the one available with REs in the customer's profile.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Ensure that the mobile number used for Aadhaar authentication is same as the one available with REs in the customer's profile to prevent duplicate records.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Aadhaar OTP-based e-KYC De-duplication' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

policies.policy_description: The policy outlines the requirements for customer due diligence and enhanced due diligence for non-face-to-face customers.
policies.objective: To ensure compliance with AML/CFT regulations and prevent financial crime

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: REs shall verify the documents submitted by customers at the time of establishment of business relationship/account-based relationship and thereafter, as necessary.
subpolicies.control: Verify customer documents before allowing operations in the account

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: REs shall verify the documents submitted by customers at the time of establishment of business relationship/account-based relationship and thereafter, as necessary.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Verification of Customer Documents' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_title: Enhanced Due Diligence for Non-Face-to-Face Customers
subpolicies.subpolicy_description: REs shall ensure enhanced due diligence for non-face-to-face customers, including verification of current address and PAN.
subpolicies.control: Verify customer's current address and PAN before allowing operations in the account

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: REs shall verify customer's current address before allowing operations in the account.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Verify Customer's Current Address' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.SubPolicyName: Enhanced Due Diligence for Non-Face-to-Face Customers

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: REs shall verify customer's PAN before allowing operations in the account.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Verify Customer's PAN' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.SubPolicyName: Enhanced Due Diligence for Non-Face-to-Face Customers

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: REs shall classify high-risk customers and subject their accounts to enhanced monitoring until identification is verified in face-to-face manner or through V-CIP, etc.
subpolicies.control: Monitor high-risk customer accounts

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: REs shall classify high-risk customers and subject their accounts to enhanced monitoring until identification is verified in face-to-face manner or through V-CIP, etc.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Monitoring of High-Risk Customers' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: REs shall ensure compliance with UNSC Sanctions Lists and lists as available in the Schedules to the Prevention and Suppression of Terrorism (Implementation of Security Council Resolutions) Order, 2007.
subpolicies.control: Verify daily and take into account any modifications to the lists

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Ensure that all REs verify the UNSC Sanctions Lists and lists as available in the Schedules to the Prevention and Suppression of Terrorism (Implementation of Security Council Resolutions) Order, 2007 on a daily basis.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Verify UNSC Sanctions Lists daily' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_title: Obligations under Weapons of Mass Destruction (WMD) Act, 2005
subpolicies.subpolicy_description: REs shall ensure compliance with the order dated 30-Jan-2023 on implementation of section 12A of WMD Act, 2005.
subpolicies.control: Verify daily and take into account any modifications to the list

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: Verify daily and take into account any modifications to the list
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Ensure compliance with the order dated 30-Jan-2023 on implementation of section 12A of WMD Act, 2005.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Verify daily and take into account any modifications to the list' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.SubPolicyName: Obligations under Weapons of Mass Destruction (WMD) Act, 2005

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: REs shall report suspicious transactions to FIU-IND in accordance with the Master Direction on KYC.
subpolicies.control: Submit STR to FIU-IND for suspicious transactions

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: REs shall report suspicious transactions to FIU-IND in accordance with the Master Direction on KYC.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Reporting to FIU-IND' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_title: Record Keeping and Maintenance of Registration Records
subpolicies.subpolicy_description: REs shall maintain registration records for a period of five years after the business relationship between the customer and RE has terminated or the account has been closed, whichever is later.
subpolicies.control: Maintain registration records

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: Record Keeping and Maintenance of Registration Records
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: REs shall maintain registration records for a period of five years after the business relationship between the customer and RE has terminated or the account has been closed, whichever is later.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Record Keeping and Maintenance of Registration Records' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.SubPolicyName: Record Keeping and Maintenance of Registration Records

policies.policy_description: Requires REs to consider adopting appropriate innovations including artificial intelligence and machine learning (AI & ML) to support effective monitoring.
policies.objective: To ensure effective monitoring of customers and transactions

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Requires REs to leverage the most recent technological advancements and tools for optimal, effective, and daily implementation of name screening.
subpolicies.control: REs must consider adopting AI & ML innovations

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: REs must leverage AI & ML innovations for optimal, effective, and daily implementation of name screening.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Innovative Technologies for Monitoring' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Requires REs to acquire KYC identifier of the customer only with specific consent from the customer to download their KYC records from CKYCR.
subpolicies.control: REs must obtain explicit consent from customers before acquiring KYC identifiers

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: REs must obtain explicit consent from customers before acquiring KYC identifiers and download their KYC records from CKYCR.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'KYC Identifier Acquisition' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Requires due diligence on the Respondent Bank prior to establishment of correspondent banking relationship, aligned with international standards.
subpolicies.control: REs must conduct due diligence on respondent banks before establishing correspondent relationships

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Conduct thorough due diligence on respondent banks before establishing correspondent banking relationships to ensure compliance with international standards.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Due Diligence on Respondent Banks' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Requires REs to include broad principles for risk categorization of customers and transactions, including geographical risk, type of products/services offered, delivery channel used, etc.
subpolicies.control: REs must develop a risk-based approach for customer categorization

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: REs must develop a risk-based approach for customer categorization based on geographical risk, type of products/services offered, delivery channel used, etc.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Risk Categorization for Customer Transactions' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Requires REs to extend additional compliance requirements to legacy accounts as well.
subpolicies.control: REs must apply additional compliance requirements to legacy accounts

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: All legacy accounts must have data encrypted at rest and in transit.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Legacy Account Data Encryption' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: All legacy accounts must have access controls in place, including multi-factor authentication and role-based access.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Legacy Account Access Control' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: All legacy accounts must undergo regular auditing and monitoring to ensure compliance with security policies.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Legacy Account Regular Auditing' may increase exposure to security incidents, audit findings, and operational inefficiencies.

policies.policy_title: Amendment to Master Direction on KYC
policies.policy_description: Amendment to the Master Direction on Know Your Customer dated 28 April 2023
policies.objective: To amend the Master Direction on KYC

policies.policy_description: Specific AML/CFT Control Areas
policies.objective: To establish a comprehensive framework for Anti-Money Laundering (AML) and Combating the Financing of Terrorism (CFT)

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: The organization shall have a clear leadership structure and governance framework in place to ensure effective implementation of AML/CFT policies.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: The organization shall have a clear and defined leadership structure in place, outlining roles and responsibilities of senior management.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Clear Leadership Structure' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: The organization shall have a governance framework in place to ensure effective implementation of AML/CFT policies, including regular review and updates.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Governance Framework' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: The organization shall establish, maintain, and update policies and procedures for AML/CFT risk management.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: The organization shall establish, maintain, and update policies and procedures for AML/CFT risk management.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Establish Policies and Procedures' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: The organization shall adopt a comprehensive risk assessment approach to identify, assess, and manage AML/CFT risks.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: The organization shall adopt a comprehensive risk assessment approach to identify, assess, and manage AML/CFT risks.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Risk Assessment Approach' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

policies.policy_description: To ensure ongoing compliance with AML/CFT regulations and standards
policies.objective: The primary objective of this policy is to establish clear requirements and guidelines for demonstrating and monitoring compliance, ensuring organizational compliance and operational effectiveness. Specific objectives include: (1) ensuring adherence to all applicable laws, regulations, and industry standards; (2) establishing systematic compliance monitoring and reporting processes; (3) minimizing regulatory and legal risks through proactive compliance management; (4) maintaining accurate documentation and evidence of compliance activities; (5) enabling effective communication with regulators and auditors; and (6) promoting a culture of compliance throughout the organization.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: The organization shall conduct customer due diligence, including verification of identity and background checks.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Verify customer identity through government-issued ID and other reliable sources.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Customer Due Diligence (KYC) - Identity Verification' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Conduct thorough background checks on customers, including criminal record and credit checks.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Customer Due Diligence (KYC) - Background Checks' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: The organization shall ensure compliance with sanctions imposed by governments and international organizations.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Screen all new employees and contractors against sanction lists before onboarding.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Sanction Screening of Employees' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: Sanction Screening of Vendors and Suppliers
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Screen all vendors and suppliers against sanction lists before engaging their services.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Sanction Screening of Vendors and Suppliers' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Screen all transactions against sanction lists before processing.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Sanction Screening of Transactions' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Provide regular training to employees on sanction compliance and the consequences of non-compliance.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Sanction Training for Employees' may increase exposure to security incidents, audit findings, and operational inefficiencies.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: The organization shall monitor transactions for suspicious activity and report any findings to the relevant authorities.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Monitor transactions for suspicious activity and report any findings to the relevant authorities.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Transaction Monitoring' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

policies.policy_description: To ensure that employees are aware of and comply with AML/CFT policies and procedures
policies.objective: The primary objective of this policy is to establish clear requirements and guidelines for underlying people controls, ensuring organizational compliance and operational effectiveness. Specific objectives include: (1) ensuring adherence to all applicable laws, regulations, and industry standards; (2) establishing systematic compliance monitoring and reporting processes; (3) minimizing regulatory and legal risks through proactive compliance management; (4) maintaining accurate documentation and evidence of compliance activities; (5) enabling effective communication with regulators and auditors; and (6) promoting a culture of compliance throughout the organization.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: The organization shall provide regular training and awareness programs for employees on AML/CFT policies and procedures.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: The organization shall provide regular training and awareness programs for employees on AML/CFT policies and procedures.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Employee Training & Awareness' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

policies.policy_description: To ensure accountability for AML/CFT compliance
policies.objective: The primary objective of this policy is to establish clear requirements and guidelines for accountability, ensuring organizational compliance and operational effectiveness. Specific objectives include: (1) ensuring adherence to all applicable laws, regulations, and industry standards; (2) establishing systematic compliance monitoring and reporting processes; (3) minimizing regulatory and legal risks through proactive compliance management; (4) maintaining accurate documentation and evidence of compliance activities; (5) enabling effective communication with regulators and auditors; and (6) promoting a culture of compliance throughout the organization.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: The organization shall maintain accurate and complete records of all AML/CFT-related activities.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: The organization shall maintain accurate and complete records of all AML/CFT-related activities, including but not limited to customer information, transaction records, and suspicious activity reports.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Maintain Accurate and Complete Records' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: The organization shall conduct regular compliance monitoring and independent testing to ensure ongoing effectiveness of AML/CFT policies and procedures.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: The organization shall conduct regular compliance monitoring to ensure ongoing effectiveness of AML/CFT policies and procedures.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Conduct Regular Compliance Monitoring' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: The organization shall conduct independent testing to ensure ongoing effectiveness of AML/CFT policies and procedures.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Conduct Independent Testing' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

policies.policy_description: REs shall ensure that a group-wide policy is implemented to discharge obligations under the provisions of Chapter IV of the Prevention of Money-laundering Act, 2002
policies.objective: To implement a group-wide policy for prevention of money laundering

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: REs shall communicate the name, designation, address and contact details of Designated Director and Principal Officer to the Reserve Bank

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: REs to communicate Designated Director and Principal Officer details to RBI
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: REs shall provide the name, designation, address and contact details of Designated Director and Principal Officer to Reserve Bank of India (RBI) as per regulatory requirements.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'REs to communicate Designated Director and Principal Officer details to RBI' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

policies.policy_description: Broad principles for risk categorization: Broad principles may be laid down by the REs for risk categorization of customers.
policies.objective: To assess and manage risks associated with customers

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: REs shall treat the risk categorization and reasons for risk categorization of customers as confidential.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: REs shall treat the risk categorization and reasons for risk categorization of customers as confidential.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Risk Categorization Compliance' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

policies.policy_description: The instructions regarding correspondent banking relationships have been aligned with international standards.
policies.objective: To establish and maintain correspondent banking relationships

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: The instructions regarding correspondent banking relationships have been aligned with international standards.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: The instructions regarding correspondent banking relationships have been aligned with international standards.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Alignment with International Standards' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Banks shall ensure that prior approval is obtained from the senior management for establishing new correspondent banking relationships.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Banks shall ensure that prior approval is obtained from senior management for establishing new correspondent banking relationships.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Prior Approval of Senior Management' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Banks shall use publicly available information which, inter alia, should include the following: ...

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Banks shall use publicly available information which, inter alia, should include the following: ...
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Due Diligence' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

policies.policy_description: Key elements of Customer Due Diligence (KYC) for regulated entities
policies.objective: To ensure compliance with KYC requirements

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: The threshold for 'controlling ownership interest' has been reduced from 25% and 15% to 10% for companies and trusts, respectively.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: The threshold for 'controlling ownership interest' has been reduced from 25% and 15% to 10% for companies and trusts, respectively.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Threshold of 'Controlling ownership interest' revised' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Regulated Entities shall ensure that CDD measures for opening accounts of non-individual customers include additional information/document requirements.
subpolicies.control: Names of relevant persons holding senior management position, details of registered office and principal place of business, etc.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Regulated Entities shall ensure that CDD measures for opening accounts of non-individual customers include additional information/document requirements.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'CDD measures for non-individual customers' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Regulated Entities shall ensure that CDD measures for opening accounts of juridical persons include obtaining certified copies of documents.
subpolicies.control: Document containing details of person authorized to act on behalf of the entity, etc.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Regulated Entities shall ensure that CDD measures for opening accounts of juridical persons include obtaining certified copies of documents.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'CDD measures for juridical person' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Regulated Entities shall ensure periodic updating of customer information through Aadhaar OTP-based e-KYC and de-duplication mechanism.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Regulated Entities shall ensure periodic updating of customer information through Aadhaar OTP-based e-KYC and de-duplication mechanism.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Periodic updation of KYC' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_title: Customer obligation to comply with PML rules
subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Customers shall submit updates of documents submitted at the time of establishment of business relationship/account-based relationship and thereafter, as necessary.

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: Customer Obligation to Comply with PML Rules
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Customers shall submit updates of documents submitted at the time of establishment of business relationship/account-based relationship and thereafter, as necessary.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Customer Obligation to Comply with PML Rules' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.SubPolicyName: Customer obligation to comply with PML rules

subpolicies.subpolicy_title: Enhanced due diligence for non-face to face customer onboarding
subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Regulated Entities shall ensure enhanced due diligence for onboarding non-face to face customers by verifying current address and obtaining PAN.
subpolicies.control: Verify current address through positive confirmation, obtain PAN from the customer

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: Enhanced Due Diligence for Non-Face to Face Customer Onboarding
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Verify current address through positive confirmation and obtain PAN from non-face to face customers during onboarding process.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Enhanced Due Diligence for Non-Face to Face Customer Onboarding' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.SubPolicyName: Enhanced due diligence for non-face to face customer onboarding

policies.policy_description: Key amendments to the Master Directions on KYC
policies.objective: To ensure compliance with Anti-Money Laundering (AML) and Combating the Financing of Terrorism (CFT) regulations

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Customers shall be classified as high-risk customers and accounts opened in non-face to face mode shall be subjected to enhanced monitoring until the customer's identification is verified in face-to-face manner or through V-CIP, etc.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Customers shall be classified as high-risk customers and accounts opened in non-face to face mode shall be subjected to enhanced monitoring until the customer's identification is verified in face-to-face manner or through V-CIP, etc.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Customer Due Diligence (KYC)' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: REs shall ensure that UNSC Sanctions Lists and lists as available in the Schedules to the Prevention and Suppression of Terrorism (Implementation of Security Council Resolutions) Order, 2007, shall be verified daily and any modifications to the lists in terms of additions, deletions or other changes shall be taken into account for meticulous compliance.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Verify UNSC Sanctions Lists and lists as available in the Schedules to the Prevention and Suppression of Terrorism (Implementation of Security Council Resolutions) Order, 2007, daily and take into account any modifications for meticulous compliance.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Sanction Compliance' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: REs shall verify daily, the 'UNSCR 1718 Sanctions List of Designated Individuals and Entities', to take into account any modifications to the list and also ensure compliance with the 'Implementation of Security Council Resolution on Democratic People's Republic of Korea Order, 2017', as amended from time to time by the Central Government.

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: Verify UNSCR 1718 Sanctions List of Designated Individuals and Entities daily
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: REs shall verify daily, the 'UNSCR 1718 Sanctions List of Designated Individuals and Entities', to take into account any modifications to the list and also ensure compliance with the 'Implementation of Security Council Resolution on Democratic People's Republic of Korea Order, 2017', as amended from time to time by the Central Government.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Verify UNSCR 1718 Sanctions List of Designated Individuals and Entities daily' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: REs shall ensure meticulous compliance with the order dated 30-Jan-2023 on implementation of section 12A of WMD Act, 2005, issued by the Ministry of Finance, Government of India.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Ensure meticulous compliance with the order dated 30-Jan-2023 on implementation of section 12A of WMD Act, 2005, issued by the Ministry of Finance, Government of India.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Regulatory Reporting and Information Sharing' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: REs shall ensure meticulous compliance with the order dated 30-Jan-2023 on implementation of section 12A of WMD Act, 2005, issued by the Ministry of Finance, Government of India.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Ensure meticulous compliance with the order dated 30-Jan-2023 on implementation of section 12A of WMD Act, 2005, issued by the Ministry of Finance, Government of India.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Obligations under Unlawful Activities (Prevention) Act, 1967' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_title: Obligations under Weapons of Mass Destruction (WMD) and their Delivery Systems (Prohibition of Unlawful Activities) Act, 2005
subpolicies.subpolicy_description: REs shall ensure meticulous compliance with the order dated 30-Jan-2023 on implementation of section 12A of WMD Act, 2005, issued by the Ministry of Finance, Government of India.

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: Implementation of Section 12A of WMD Act, 2005
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Ensure meticulous compliance with the order dated 30-Jan-2023 issued by the Ministry of Finance, Government of India.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Implementation of Section 12A of WMD Act, 2005' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.SubPolicyName: Obligations under Weapons of Mass Destruction (WMD) and their Delivery Systems (Prohibition of Unlawful Activities) Act, 2005

policies.policy_description: Policy for accepting customers and reporting suspicious transactions.
policies.objective: To ensure compliance with AML/CFT regulations and report suspicious transactions to FIU-IND.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Policy for reporting suspicious transactions to FIU-IND when CDD process may alert or tip-off the customer.
subpolicies.control: Submit a Suspicious Transaction Report (STR) instead of pursuing CDD process.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Submit a Suspicious Transaction Report (STR) instead of pursuing CDD process when CDD process may alert or tip-off the customer.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Reporting Suspicious Transactions' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

policies.policy_description: Policy for maintaining records related to customers and business relationships.
policies.objective: To ensure compliance with record-keeping requirements under the Master Direction on KYC.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Policy for registering customers who are non-profit organizations on the DARPAN Portal of NITI Aayog.
subpolicies.control: Ensure registration on DARPAN Portal and maintain records for five years after business relationship termination.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Register customers who are non-profit organizations on the DARPAN Portal of NITI Aayog within a specified timeframe.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Ensure Registration on DARPAN Portal' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Retain records of registered customers who are non-profit organizations on the DARPAN Portal for a minimum period of five years after business relationship termination.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Maintain Records for Five Years' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Policy for maintaining registration records for a period of five years after business relationship termination or account closure.
subpolicies.control: Maintain registration records for five years after business relationship termination or account closure.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Maintain registration records for a period of five years after business relationship termination or account closure.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Maintenance of Registration Records' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

policies.policy_title: Amendment to Master Direction on KYC
policies.policy_description: Alignment with PML Act, 2002 and rules thereunder, incorporation of Government order w.r.t WMD Act, 2005, updation in accordance with FATF recommendations and prevention of money laundering, terrorist financing, and other forms of financial crime.
policies.objective: To ensure meticulous compliance with the PML Act, 2002 and rules thereunder, UAPA Act, 1967, WMD Act, 2005, appropriate record management, periodic updation of KYC, appropriate due diligence of correspondent banking relationships, introduction of new technologies, enhanced due diligence etc.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: REs need to have effective oversight over AML/KYC activities. This would entail significant effort on the part of RE and senior management.
subpolicies.control: Senior management and REs involved in setting policies and procedures for compliance with these amendments, frequent monitoring of transactions

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Senior management and REs need to have effective oversight over AML/KYC activities, which would entail significant effort on the part of RE and senior management.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Effective Oversight over AML/KYC Activities' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.PolicyTitle: Amendment to Master Direction on KYC

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: REs to consider adopting appropriate innovations including artificial intelligence and machine learning (AI & ML) to support effective monitoring.
subpolicies.control: REs to leverage recent technological advancements and tools for optimal, effective and daily implementation of name screening

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: Adopt AI & ML for Name Screening
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: REs must leverage recent technological advancements and tools to support effective monitoring by adopting appropriate innovations, including artificial intelligence and machine learning (AI & ML).
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Adopt AI & ML for Name Screening' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.PolicyTitle: Amendment to Master Direction on KYC

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: REs need to include additional information/document requirements at the time of establishment of relationship with 'Companies', 'Partnership Firms' and 'Trusts'.
subpolicies.control: Acquisition of KYC identifier of customer only with specific consent from customer

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: REs need to include additional information/document requirements at the time of establishment of relationship with 'Companies', 'Partnership Firms' and 'Trusts'.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Additional Information/Document Requirements' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.PolicyTitle: Amendment to Master Direction on KYC

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Instructions regarding correspondent banking relationships have been aligned with international standards which require due diligence on the Respondent Bank prior to establishment of correspondent banking relationship.
subpolicies.control: Due diligence on respondent bank prior to establishment of correspondent banking relationship

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Conduct thorough due diligence on respondent bank prior to establishment of correspondent banking relationship, including review of their anti-money laundering and combating the financing of terrorism (AML/CFT) policies and procedures.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Due Diligence on Respondent Bank' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.PolicyTitle: Amendment to Master Direction on KYC

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: REs need to include broad principles which may be laid down for risk categorization of customers for risk management. Parameters of such risk categorization have been expanded to include geographical risk, type of products/services offered, delivery channel used for products/services delivery, types of transaction undertaken etc.
subpolicies.control: Risk-based approach for risk management involves appropriate changes to meet the amendments specified by RBI

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: REs need to include broad principles which may be laid down for risk categorization of customers for risk management.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Risk Categorization for Customers' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.PolicyTitle: Amendment to Master Direction on KYC

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: REs need to consider geographical risk while categorizing customers for risk management.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Geographical Risk Categorization' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.PolicyTitle: Amendment to Master Direction on KYC

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: REs need to consider type of products/services offered while categorizing customers for risk management.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Product/Service Risk Categorization' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.PolicyTitle: Amendment to Master Direction on KYC

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: REs need to consider delivery channel used for products/services delivery while categorizing customers for risk management.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Delivery Channel Risk Categorization' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.PolicyTitle: Amendment to Master Direction on KYC

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: REs need to consider types of transaction undertaken while categorizing customers for risk management.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Transaction Risk Categorization' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.PolicyTitle: Amendment to Master Direction on KYC

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: REs need to adopt a risk-based approach for risk management and make appropriate changes to meet the amendments specified by RBI.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Risk-Based Approach for Risk Management' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.PolicyTitle: Amendment to Master Direction on KYC

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: REs will have to revamp their customer experience journey to make it a seamless process. They will have to ensure minimal/no impact on business simultaneously while complying with regulatory requirements.
subpolicies.control: Minimal/no impact on business while complying with regulatory requirements

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Ensure customer data is protected and compliant with regulatory requirements during the revamp of the customer experience journey.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Customer Data Protection' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.PolicyTitle: Amendment to Master Direction on KYC

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Conduct a thorough business impact assessment to ensure minimal/no impact on the business during the revamp of the customer experience journey.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Business Impact Assessment' may increase exposure to security incidents, audit findings, and operational inefficiencies.
compliance_records.PolicyTitle: Amendment to Master Direction on KYC

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Ensure compliance with all relevant regulatory requirements during the revamp of the customer experience journey.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Regulatory Requirements Compliance' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.PolicyTitle: Amendment to Master Direction on KYC

policies.policy_description: The information contained herein is of a general nature and is not intended to address the circumstances of any particular individual or entity.
policies.objective: To provide accurate and timely information, while acknowledging that such information may not be accurate as of the date it is received or in the future.
